title: MarkoTab
description: MarkoTab is a beautiful browser extension that replaces your new tab page with a clean, customizable dashboard. Keep your bookmarks front and center, organize your favorite sites, and access everything you need with ease.

title: dolarsol.pe
description: Compare USD/PEN exchange rates from multiple exchange houses in Peru. Instantly find the best rate and maximize your savings.

title: Guitar Chords
description: An interactive guitar chord library featuring searchable diagrams, audio playback, and everything you need to learn and practice chords.

title: SubstackMD
description: A browser extension that allows you to export your Substack posts to clean Markdown or publish to a Github repository in one click.

title: One Thing
description: A GNOME Shell extension that keeps a single task or goal visible in your top bar, helping you stay focused throughout the day.

title: Voice Recorder
description: An open source voice recorder that allows you to record and play back your voice for free.

title: Musicami
description: An open-source music streaming player with playlists, collections, search, and seamless audio playback. Built around a third-party streaming API, it showcases full-stack development and a polished user experience.

title: Audio Tag Editor
description: A simple but useful app that allows you to edit the metadata of your MP3 and other audio files with ease. Update song titles, artists, albums, cover art, and more through a simple, intuitive interface designed for quick edits.
